mapper.insert:
insert into hc_user_permission_menu (id, user_id, tenant_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.createBy}, now())
mapper.delete: delete from hc_user_permission_menu where user_id = #{userId} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
